Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 3, 2026

Information We Collect

We collect minimal information needed to operate our website. This may include anonymous analytics data (page views, referrer URLs) and any information you voluntarily submit through our contact form.

How We Use Your Information

We use collected information solely to improve our content, respond to inquiries, and maintain the website. We do not sell, rent, or share personal information with third parties.

Cookies

This site may use minimal cookies for essential functionality. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising cookies.

Third-Party Services

Our website uses Cloudflare Pages for hosting. Cloudflare's privacy policy applies to data processed through their infrastructure. We also embed content from GitHub and Telegram via links; those services have their own privacy policies.

Data Retention

We retain contact form submissions only as long as necessary to address the inquiry. Analytics data is retained in aggregate form only.

Contact

For privacy-related questions, contact us at mintdmca@gmail.com.

Copyright News

Your trusted source for technology news, influencer culture, and creator economy insights.
